dict.source: Please note that the maintainer of Willemstad does not have access to either a Mac and/or an iOS device, which have slightly different styling in the core Obsidian app. Therefore, the theme has not been ensured to work properly with macOS and iOS. Bug reports are however very welcome to resolve these issues.

dict.source: A Brief Lesson on Colour Theory Before You Start
dict.target: 开始前的色彩理论简课

dict.source: Colours can be organized on a 360° hue wheel to create specific harmonies. Analogous colours, which are close neighbours on the wheel (typically 15-45° apart), produce a calm and gentle effect. For a more vibrant yet balanced feel, a triadic scheme uses three colours spaced exactly 120° apart. A split-complementary harmony offers high contrast with less tension by pairing one colour with the two neighbours of its direct opposite.
dict.target: 色彩可在360°色相环上组织以创造特定和谐。类似色在色环上彼此接近（通常相隔15-45°），能产生平静柔和的效果。若追求更鲜明且平衡的感觉，三色配色方案使用相隔恰好120°的三种颜色。分裂互补和谐则通过将一种颜色与其直接互补色的两个邻近色配对，提供高对比度且张力较小的效果。
设置强调色的色相范围

dict.source: Adjust the hue shift to create different colour harmonies. 0° = monochromatic, 30-60° = analogous, 90° = tetradic, 120° = triadic, 150° = split-complementary, 180° = complementary.
dict.target: 调整色相偏移以创造不同的色彩和谐。0° = 单色，30-60° = 类似色，90° = 四色，120° = 三色，150° = 分裂互补，180° = 互补。
设置强调色的明度范围

dict.source: Control how much darker each accent becomes. Higher values create more contrast between accent variations. Recommended: 5-15% (0.05-0.15) for subtle differences, 15-25% (0.15-0.25) for distinct variations.
dict.target: 控制每个强调色变体的暗度。数值越高，强调色变体之间的对比度越大。建议：5-15% (0.05-0.15) 用于细微差异，15-25% (0.15-0.25) 用于明显变体。

dict.source: note; abstract, summary, tldr; info, todo; tip, hint; check, done; question, help, faq; warning, caution, attention; failure, fail, missing; danger, error; bug; example; quote, cite; file, attachment; phone; email, mail; goal; success; important; code; positive, plus; negative, minus
dict.target: note; abstract, summary, tldr; info, todo; tip, hint; check, done; question, help, faq; warning, caution, attention; failure, fail, missing; danger, error; bug; example; quote, cite; file, attachment; phone, email, mail; goal; success; important; code; positive, plus; negative, minus

dict.source: Choose the visual style for callouts. 'Willemstad' is the default theme style. To use Obsidian's standard styling, please use the 'Revent to Original Obsidian Styling on Standard Callouts' toggle below this option.
dict.target: 选择标注的视觉样式。“Willemstad”是默认主题样式。要使用Obsidian的标准样式，请使用此选项下方的“在标准标注上恢复原始Obsidian样式”开关。

dict.source: Revert to Original Obsidian Styling on Standard Callouts
dict.target: 在标准标注上恢复原始Obsidian样式

dict.source: Willemstad by default styles the callouts, toggle this in order to disable this and return to Obsidian's standard callouts appearance.
dict.target: Willemstad默认为标注添加样式，切换此选项可禁用此功能并恢复为Obsidian的标准标注外观。

dict.source: Disable Callout Border Hover/Always Show Callout Border
dict.target: 禁用标注边框悬停/始终显示标注边框

dict.source: By default, the colored left border on callouts only appears on hover. When enabled, this makes the border permanently visible. If you do not want a border, toggle this to always show the border and set the callout border width below to zero.
dict.target: 默认情况下，标注上的彩色左边框仅在悬停时出现。启用后，边框将永久可见。如果您不想要边框，请切换此选项以始终显示边框，并将下方的标注边框宽度设置为零。

dict.source: Controls the additional thickness of the colored left border on callouts, added to the base width. Set this and the base width to zero to hide the border completely. Default is 5px.
dict.target: 控制标注上彩色左边框的额外厚度，该厚度会添加到基础宽度上。将此选项和基础宽度都设置为零可完全隐藏边框。默认值为5px。

dict.source: Overrides the base border width for callouts. Accepts any valid CSS length (e.g., 1px, 0.25rem, 0) or variables that resolves to a length. The default is set in a way that the override will take the values of any presets set by the callout.
dict.target: 覆盖标注的基础边框宽度。接受任何有效的CSS长度值（例如1px、0.25rem、0）或解析为长度的变量。默认设置方式使得覆盖将采用标注设置的任何预设值。

dict.source: Changes the font size of the infobox title, using the heading sizes defined in Willemstad.
dict.target: 更改信息框标题的字体大小，使用Willemstad中定义的标题大小。
信息框标注的最大宽度

dict.source: Sets the maximum width of the infobox relative to the pane size. The infobox will not grow larger than this percentage.
dict.target: 设置信息框相对于窗格大小的最大宽度。信息框不会增长到超过此百分比。
信息框标注的理想宽度

dict.source: Sets the ideal target width of the infobox. If this value is larger than the 'Maximum Width of Infobox Callouts', the maximum width will take precedence. You can use any valid CSS unit, such as 500px, 50%, 40vw, 30em, etc.
dict.target: 设置信息框的理想目标宽度。如果此值大于“信息框标注的最大宽度”，则最大宽度将优先。您可以使用任何有效的 CSS 单位，例如 500px、50%、40vw、30em 等。
将侧边标注默认左浮动

dict.source: The aside callouts float right by default. Toggle this option to change the float to left by default. You can float an aside left/right individually via global metadata classes 'fl', 'float-l', 'float-left' for left, and 'fr', 'float-r', 'float-right' for right.
dict.target: 侧边标注默认右浮动。切换此选项可将默认浮动方向更改为左浮动。您可以通过全局元数据类 'fl'、'float-l'、'float-left' 使单个侧边标注左浮动，通过 'fr'、'float-r'、'float-right' 使其右浮动。

dict.source: w1, width-1; w2, width-2; w3, width-3; w4, width-4; w5, width-5;

Sets the margin above children callouts to create vertical space between the children callouts and the column callout title. You can use any valid CSS unit, or valid variables, such as 20px, 1.5em, 2vh, etc.
dict.target: 设置子标注上方的边距，以在子标注和分栏标注标题之间创建垂直空间。您可以使用任何有效的 CSS 单位或有效变量，例如 20px、1.5em、2vh 等。

dict.source: Default Title Display for Image Callouts
dict.target: 图片标注的默认标题显示

dict.source: Controls whether the title is globally hidden for [!images] callouts. To show/hide the title on a per-callout basis, please use the relevant metadata classes.
dict.target: 控制 [!images] 标注的标题是否全局隐藏。要在每个标注的基础上显示/隐藏标题，请使用相关的元数据类。

dict.source: Image Border Radius in Gallery-style Image Callouts
dict.target: 画廊式图片标注中的图片圆角半径

dict.source: Controls the border radius of images inside gallery-style callouts. Accepts any valid CSS radius value (e.g., 0, 4px, var(--radius-m)).
dict.target: 控制画廊式标注内图片的圆角半径。接受任何有效的 CSS 圆角值（例如 0、4px、var(--radius-m)）。

dict.source: Image Border Radius in Grid-style Image Callouts
dict.target: 网格式图片标注中的图片圆角半径

dict.source: Gap between Images in Grid-style Image Callouts
dict.target: 网格式图片标注中图片之间的间距

dict.source: Controls the gap/spacing between images within an image grid callout. Accepts any valid CSS length (e.g., 4px, 0.5em, 1rem).
dict.target: 控制图片网格标注内图片之间的间距。接受任何有效的 CSS 长度值（例如 4px、0.5em、1rem）。

dict.source: Sets the height of the banner image. You can use any valid CSS unit (e.g., 200px, 25vh).
dict.target: 设置横幅图片的高度。您可以使用任何有效的 CSS 单位（例如，200px、25vh）。

dict.source: Sets the margin below the banner image, creating space between the banner and the content below it. Accepts any valid CSS unit (e.g., 0px, 1em).
dict.target: 设置横幅图片下方的边距，在横幅与其下方内容之间创建空间。接受任何有效的 CSS 单位（例如，0px、1em）。

dict.source: Defines the linear gradient used to fade the bottom of the banner image. Modify this to change the fading effect.
dict.target: 定义用于淡化横幅图片底部的线性渐变。修改此项以更改淡化效果。

dict.source: To use progress bars, use the following syntax below, which is also copyable for your own convenience. Change the value of the progress bar by changing the value attribute. Change the max value by changing the max attribute.
dict.target: 要使用进度条，请使用下面的语法，该语法也可复制以供您方便使用。通过更改 value 属性的值来更改进度条的值。通过更改 max 属性来更改最大值。

dict.source: Willemstad changes the default Progress Bar styling, however this is only appropriate for Progress Bars using a 0-100 scale. Toggling this would result in the original Progress Bar colour styling used instead.
dict.target: Willemstad 更改了默认的进度条样式，但这仅适用于使用 0-100 刻度的进度条。切换此选项将导致使用原始的进度条颜色样式。

dict.source: To use HTML Aside, use the following syntax below, which is also copyable for your own convenience. HTML Aside floats to the right by default, allowing you to add notes. Please note that markdown syntax DOES NOT work inside HTML Aside — instead, you must use HTML Syntax to reflect changes (for example, instead of **** for bold text).
dict.target: 要使用 HTML 侧边栏，请使用下面的语法，该语法也可复制以供您方便使用。HTML 侧边栏默认向右浮动，允许您添加注释。请注意，Markdown 语法在 HTML 侧边栏内不起作用——相反，您必须使用 HTML 语法来反映更改（例如，使用 而非 **** 来表示粗体文本）。

dict.source: This option allows one to change the text alignment and justification of the HTML Aside. By default, the text is aligned to the left.
dict.target: 此选项允许更改 HTML 侧边栏的文本对齐和对齐方式。默认情况下，文本左对齐。

dict.source: This option allows one to change the float alignment of the HTML Aside. By default, the aside is floated to the right. Should you choose to float it to the left, it is recommended to enable the "Overflow Fix" option.
dict.target: 此选项允许更改 HTML 侧边栏的浮动对齐方式。默认情况下，侧边栏向右浮动。如果您选择将其向左浮动，建议启用“溢出修复”选项。

dict.source: To use HTML Infobox, use the following syntax below, which is also copyable for your own convenience. HTML Infobox is very similar to HTML Aside, except that the title in HTML Infobox is styled as well. Like in HTML Aside, markdown syntax DOES NOT work inside HTML Infobox — instead, you must use HTML Syntax to reflect changes (for example, instead of **** for bold text).
dict.target: 要使用 HTML 信息框，请使用下面的语法，该语法也可复制以供您方便使用。HTML 信息框与 HTML 侧边栏非常相似，不同之处在于 HTML 信息框中的标题也会被样式化。与 HTML 侧边栏一样，Markdown 语法在 HTML 信息框内不起作用——相反，您必须使用 HTML 语法来反映更改（例如，使用 而非 **** 来表示粗体文本）。

dict.source: <aside class=infobox><title>title goes here</title> text goes here</aside>
dict.target: <aside class=infobox><title>标题在此处</title> 文本在此处</aside>

dict.source: This option allows one to change the float alignment of the HTML Infobox. By default, the infobox is floated to the right. Should you choose to float it to the left, it is recommended to enable the "Overflow Fix" option.
dict.target: 此选项允许更改 HTML 信息框的浮动对齐方式。默认情况下，信息框向右浮动。如果您选择将其向左浮动，建议启用“溢出修复”选项。

dict.source: This option allows one to choose one of the accent colours for today's date in the Calendar plugin.
dict.target: 此选项允许您为日历插件中的今日日期选择一种强调色。

dict.source: This option allows one to choose one of the accent colours for the year in the Calendar plugin.
dict.target: 此选项允许您为日历插件中的年份选择一种强调色。

dict.source: Vertical Scroll Kanbans in Side Panes
dict.target: 侧边窗格中的看板垂直滚动

dict.source: When enabled, multiple kanban lanes in the side panes can be navigated via scrolling vertically rather than scrolling horizontally.
dict.target: 启用后，侧边窗格中的多个看板泳道可以通过垂直滚动而非水平滚动来导航。

dict.source: Fit to Width of Side Panes
When enabled, the kanban lanes in the side panes will fit to the width of the side panes.
dict.target: 启用后，侧边窗格中的看板泳道将适应侧边窗格的宽度。

dict.source: Max Height of Vertical Kanban Lane in Side Panes
dict.target: 侧边窗格中垂直看板泳道的最大高度

dict.source: Set the maximum height of each kanban lane in the side panes, when vertical.
dict.target: 设置侧边窗格中每个垂直看板泳道的最大高度。

dict.source: Vertical Scroll Kanbans in Main Workspace (Editor) Panes
dict.target: 主工作区（编辑器）窗格中的看板垂直滚动

dict.source: When enabled, multiple kanban lanes in the main workspace panes can be navigated via scrolling vertically rather than scrolling horizontally.
dict.target: 启用后，主工作区窗格中的多个看板泳道可以通过垂直滚动而非水平滚动来导航。

dict.source: Fit to Width of Main Workspace (Editor) Panes
dict.target: 适应主工作区（编辑器）窗格宽度

dict.source: When enabled, the kanban lanes in the main workspace panes will fit to the width of the pane.
dict.target: 启用后，主工作区窗格中的看板泳道将适应窗格的宽度。

dict.source: Max Height of Vertical Kanban Lane in Main Workspace (Editor) Panes
dict.target: 主工作区（编辑器）窗格中垂直看板泳道的最大高度

dict.source: Set the maximum height of each kanban lane in the main workspace panes, when vertical.
dict.target: 设置主工作区窗格中每个垂直看板泳道的最大高度。

dict.source: Enable Canvas-style Dotted Background for Kanban
dict.target: 为看板启用画布风格点状背景

dict.source: When enabled, the kanban views will have a canvas-style dotted background.
dict.target: 启用后，看板视图将呈现画布风格的点状背景。
背景颜色（画布风格背景）

dict.source: This option allows one to choose one of the global accent and background colours for the canvas-style background.
dict.target: 此选项允许您为画布风格背景选择一种全局强调色和背景色。

dict.source: This option allows one to choose one of the global accent and background colours for the dots in the canvas-style background.
dict.target: 此选项允许您为画布风格背景中的点选择一种全局强调色和背景色。

dict.source: Set the size of the dots in the canvas-style background.
dict.target: 设置画布风格背景中点的大小。

dict.source: Set the spacing of the dots in the canvas-style background.
dict.target: 设置画布风格背景中点的间距。
移除 Willemstad 设置的 Templater 调整

dict.source: Willemstad by default adds certain tweaks to the Templater plugin, including setting the same font-type and the disabling of text decoration for non-Templater items inline within a series of Templater code. When enabled, these tweaks will be removed.
dict.target: Willemstad 默认会对 Templater 插件进行一些调整，包括设置相同的字体类型，以及在一系列 Templater 代码中禁用非 Templater 项目的文本装饰。启用此选项后，这些调整将被移除。
移除 Willemstad 设置的工具栏调整

dict.source: By default, Willemstad tweaks the Advanced Tables toolbar to remove the prefixed explanations and the Advanced Tables toolbar title. This option allows you to remove these tweaks and restore the plugin's original toolbar appearance.
dict.target: 默认情况下，Willemstad 会调整 Advanced Tables 工具栏，移除前缀说明和工具栏标题。此选项允许您移除这些调整，恢复插件原始的工具栏外观。

dict.source: This option allows you to change the justification of the Advanced Tables Toolbar
dict.target: 此选项允许您更改 Advanced Tables 工具栏的对齐方式。

dict.source: The Full Calendar plugin has half-hour lines by default. When this option is enabled, the half-hour demarcation lines will be removed.
dict.target: Full Calendar 插件默认显示半小时分隔线。启用此选项后，半小时分隔线将被移除。
使用原始 Excalidraw 颜色样式

dict.source: Willemstad changes the default Excalidraw colour styling to match the theme. When enabled, the original Excalidraw colour styling will be used.
dict.target: Willemstad 主题会将默认的 Excalidraw 颜色样式调整为与主题匹配。启用此选项后，将使用原始的 Excalidraw 颜色样式。
使用非彩色标题栏样式

dict.source: Willemstad changes the titlebar colour to match the theme. This means that the titlebar colour for Hover Editor also changes, whilst 'Use Accent Colour for Titlebar' is enabled. When this option is enabled, the original tab bar colour will be used instead.
dict.target: Willemstad 主题会将标题栏颜色调整为与主题匹配。这意味着，当“为标题栏使用强调色”选项启用时，悬浮编辑器的标题栏颜色也会随之改变。启用此选项后，将使用原始的标签栏颜色。

dict.source: As a matter of principle, I have not, do not, and will not accept monetary compensation/donations of any kind for Willemstad, as my intention has always been to create something that works for me and contribute back to the community. In the event you would like to support Willemstad, please spread the word about the theme, and star the GitHub repository, accessible on the button to the right. Should you still wish to contribute monetarily, please direct your funds elsewhere to other Obsidian community members and theme developers in this list, all of which have contributed to Willemstad and/or the Obsidian theme development scene in one way or another. [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/tingmelvin/willemstad-x)
dict.target: 出于原则，我从未、现在不会、将来也不会接受任何形式的金钱补偿或捐赠，因为我的初衷一直是为自己创造一个有用的东西，并回馈社区。如果您想支持 Willemstad，请向他人推荐这个主题，并为右侧按钮可访问的 GitHub 仓库点星。如果您仍然希望进行金钱捐赠，请将您的资金转给此列表中的其他 Obsidian 社区成员和主题开发者，他们都以各种方式为 Willemstad 和/或 Obsidian 主题开发领域做出了贡献。[GitHub 仓库](https://github.com/tingmelvin/willemstad-x)

dict.source: Immersive Editing Modes — Focused & Super Focused Mode
dict.target: 沉浸式编辑模式 — 专注模式与超级专注模式

dict.source: Immersive Editing Modes (Focused Mode and Super Focused Mode)
dict.target: 沉浸式编辑模式（专注模式与超级专注模式）

dict.source: Styles that hide UI elements and fade out non-active lines to help you focus on writing.
dict.target: 隐藏UI元素并淡化非活动行的样式，以帮助您专注于写作。
关于沉浸式编辑模式的说明

dict.source: Please note that the immersive editing modes (Focused and Super Focused Modes) can be set via hotkeys and is accessible via the Command Palette. Please see the Obsidian's documentation (accessible via the button on the right) to do this. Immersive Editing Modes takes inspiration from [Ryan McQuen's Focus Mode plugin](https://github.com/ryanpcmcquen/obsidian-focus-mode), which Willemstad's maintainer used to use extensively years ago. [Obsidian Docs](https://help.obsidian.md/hotkeys)
dict.target: 请注意，沉浸式编辑模式（专注模式和超级专注模式）可以通过快捷键设置，并可通过命令面板访问。请参阅Obsidian的文档（可通过右侧按钮访问）以了解如何操作。沉浸式编辑模式的灵感来源于[Ryan McQuen的Focus Mode插件](https://github.com/ryanpcmcquen/obsidian-focus-mode)，Willemstad的维护者多年前曾广泛使用该插件。 [Obsidian文档](https://help.obsidian.md/hotkeys)

dict.source: Hides all UI elements (status bar, sidebars, etc.) except for the tab header bar, and fades out lines of text that are not near your active line. Please note that this setting can be set to a hotkey, and is available via your Command Palette.
dict.target: 隐藏所有UI元素（状态栏、侧边栏等），仅保留标签页标题栏，并淡化远离当前活动行的文本行。请注意，此设置可以绑定到快捷键，并可通过命令面板访问。

dict.source: An even more extreme focus mode. Hides all elements, except the current active page. Does not require 'Focused Mode' enabled. Please note that this setting can be set to a hotkey, and is available via your Command Palette.
dict.target: 一种更为极致的专注模式。隐藏所有元素，仅保留当前活动页面。无需启用“专注模式”。请注意，此设置可以绑定到快捷键，并可通过命令面板访问。

dict.source: Controls the minimum opacity for lines far away from your active line in Focused Mode. Default is 0.2.
dict.target: 控制在专注模式下远离活动行的文本行的最小不透明度。默认值为0.2。

dict.source: Controls the opacity of the lines fade out as they get further from the active line. Higher values mean a bigger difference in opacity, which is stepped by the value you input here, multiplied by the amount of lines away from the active line it is (up to the third line). The default is 0.15.
dict.target: 控制随着行远离活动行而淡化的不透明度。较高的值意味着不透明度差异更大，该差异按您在此输入的值步进，并乘以该行与活动行之间的行数（最多到第三行）。默认值为0.15。
